text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the beginning of Manhattan Cafe's senior
year, and we've come to the shrine to pray for her
success.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Um... where's Tachyon? She usually comes along
whether we invite her or not.
choice_data_list: She said she was too busy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A shrine visit? Sorry, but my research schedule is
fairly hectic at the moment.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now that Cafe's condition has improved, the
stress on her toenails and sesamoids has
increased immensely! Almost comically so.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll see what I can do. And I don't think I
need to tell you, but not a word of this to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If anyone asks after me, just tell them that I
caught a cold and am sleeping in a hotel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is looking out for Manhattan Cafe
in her own way.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
So that leaves the two of us today... For some
reason, my friend isn't here either...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe has been acting strange ever
since the Arima Kinen. She's not usually like this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's normally quite even-tempered, but...

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone, it's time for your New Year
prayers! Remember, the gods will grant any wish
you make!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Lies.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No one will see their wishes come true. There are
no peaceful gods here to grant them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still... sometimes she gets like this. Maybe there's
some kind of trigger?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this way... Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...To the town that will grant any wish we make.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes me to a strange town that feels a
million miles away from the bustle of the New
Year festivities.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This is the only place where your wishes really will
come true...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
What will you wish for me, Trainer? ...To help me
catch up to my friend.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Choose from among those that emerge before
you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, some strange text appears at my feet.
Trembling, I make my choice...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Soothing... Yes... The stars watch over us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If we bathe our bodies in the light of the
unyielding stars...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. My body feels a little
revitalized...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to focus on training now. I'll look
ahead... and move forward...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Was that town an illusion? ...Whatever the truth
may be, the life has come back to Manhattan
Cafe's face.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A body covered in scales... Covering my hair... my
retinas... my soul...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If only I could expand my very existence. Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sploosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The night sea. I dream that I am sinking beneath
the waves. Falling... endlessly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how strange. My measurements are telling me
that your muscle strength and endurance have
improved, Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Did you do some training during your shrine visit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We didn't do any training. But it does look like
that wish had some kind of effect.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The wisdom of the departed... The memories of
our predecessors...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
If only we could look into the past... Just a
glimpse would be enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Memories I could never have known flood my
mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sights I'm not sure even existed... Ancient
knowledge of them...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm starting to believe there are many
styles of running. I wish to...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Try out these... new methods in my races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A flash of history. Perhaps Manhattan Cafe
witnessed something only her eyes could see.
